advisories.description: TeamPCP supply chain attack. Credential stealer and malware dropper. Exfiltrates environment variables, SSH keys, cloud credentials to attacker C2.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. Use litellm@1.82.6 or earlier. Verify version before installing.

advisories.description: Supply chain compromise via GitHub Actions injection. Delivered XMRig cryptominer. Multiple versions affected across two separate incidents.
advisories.action: BLOCK install of compromised versions. Use ultralytics>=8.3.47.

advisories.description: Typosquat of termcolor. DLL side-loading, persistence, C2 communication. 884 downloads before removal.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. This is a malicious typosquat package — the legitimate package is 'termcolor'.

advisories.description: Malicious package — DLL side-loading, persistence, C2 communication. Part of the same campaign as termncolor.
advisories.action: BLOCK install. This is a malicious package, not a typosquat fix.

notes: PyPI compromised package registry. Checked by the Claude Code package-install hook before any pip/pip3 install. Managed via APS record #40 (pypi-supply-chain).
